message.content: {"items":[{"title":"ALLBUS 1980 – Allgemeine Bevölkerungsumfrage der Sozialwissenschaften","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13322","justification":"German General Social Survey 1980 with questions on historical consciousness, political history, and social change in post‑war Germany (covers attitudes to events from the 1940s onward)."},{"title":"ALLBUS 1991 – Allgemeine Bevölkerungsumfrage der Sozialwissenschaften","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13331","justification":"Nationwide survey in Germany including items on German history, reunification, National Socialism, and historical memory (relevant to perceptions of the 1940s–1990s)."},{"title":"German General Social Survey – ALLBUS 1992 (History and Politics Module)","url_or_doi":"https://dbk.gesis.org/dbksearch/sdesc2.asp?no=2480&db=e&doi=10.4232/1.2480","justification":"Contains a dedicated module on history and politics, including historical consciousness and evaluation of key periods of German history from the Nazi era through the Federal Republic and GDR decades."},{"title":"Politische Einstellungen, politische Partizipation und historisches Bewusstsein in der Bundesrepublik Deutschland 1980","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0437","justification":"Survey on political attitudes, participation, and historical consciousness in the Federal Republic of Germany; explicitly measures views of German history including the 1940s–1970s."},{"title":"Historisches Bewusstsein in Deutschland 1990","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0515","justification":"Focuses on historical consciousness in Germany around reunification; covers perceptions of the Nazi period, post‑war decades, GDR history, and Federal Republic history up to the late 1980s."},{"title":"Nachkriegsdeutschland im Urteil der Bevölkerung 1953","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4318","justification":"Early post‑war survey on public opinion in Germany about the immediate post‑1945 period, reconstruction, and interpretations of recent German history in the late 1940s and early 1950s."},{"title":"Deutsche Nachkriegsgeschichte im Urteil der Bevölkerung 1964","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4304","justification":"Addresses how the German population in 1964 assessed post‑war German history, including interpretations of the 1940s and 1950s within the Federal Republic."},{"title":"Vergangenheitsbewältigung in der Bundesrepublik Deutschland 1960","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4301","justification":"Survey on how West Germans in 1960 dealt with the Nazi past; directly targets historical evaluation of the 1930s–1940s and its legacy in the 1950s and 1960s."},{"title":"Deutsche Einigung 1990 – Einstellungen zur Geschichte der beiden deutschen Staaten","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.5039","justification":"Study around German unification focusing on attitudes toward the history of the FRG and GDR; examines historical narratives about the 1940s–1990s in both German states."},{"title":"Youth and History – A Comparative European Survey on Historical Consciousness of Youth in Germany 1994","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.5027","justification":"Part of a European project on historical consciousness among youth; German sample includes questions on how young people see key events and periods of national history, especially 20th‑century decades up to the early 1990s."}]}
